## How to Test

1. Run the relevant validation commands.
2. Exercise the user flow or scenario covered by this PR.
3. Verify the expected result.
4. Re-run if idempotency / repeatability matters.

## Definition of Done (DoD)

- [ ] Scope matches the linked issue
- [ ] Relevant tests/checks pass
- [ ] Docs / ADRs updated when required
- [ ] No unintended breaking changes introduced
